name: Lemon Sauce Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a pie dish.
3. Separate the eggs.
4. Grate the lemon rind and finely squeeze the juice.
5. Mix together softened butter, sugar, and lemon rind in a bowl.
6. Beat in egg yolks and lemon juice.
7. Add flour and salt, then add milk in thirds alternately (the mixture may look curdled at this stage).
8. Whisk the egg whites until they form soft peaks, then fold into the mixture.
9. Pour into the prepared dish and stand the dish in a shallow pan of water (Bain Marie).
10. Bake for 40 minutes and serve immediately.
